rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>是这样的……<unk[5:0]>我的妻子迪美去捕鱼的时候，

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>“找到的地方～轻飘飘♪”<unk[5:1]>

然后，妻子她就蹦蹦跳跳地
从领地<Color=red>东边<Color=white>的桥上跑走了……
<unk[3:0:259]>当时我也没当回事，
后来才反倒在意起来……

「抓到的是～蹦蹦跳的鮮魚～♪」<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:259]>當時只是覺得稀鬆平常，所以聽完就算了，
但是後來卻越想越好奇……

<Ruby={2:4}あと>後から どんどん<Ruby={2:2}き>気になってきて…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Here is my tale...<unk[5:0]> When my dear wife, Mei,
went out fishing, she was singing this
mysterious song to herself...
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>♪I found a floating place,<unk[5:0]> where I'll catch
fish with grace!<unk[5:1]> A hop and a skip to a
great fishing trip!♪
And with that, my wife hopped and
skipped over to the bridge in the <Color=red>east<Color=white>
of the domain.
<unk[3:0:259]>At the time, I paid it no heed. She is given
to songs of fancy. But her absence has
started to weigh heavily on my mind.

I have never heard of such a place.

excitement. I am worried that she will do
something rash.
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Oh, my beloved Mei... I dearly hope that
she has not gone somewhere dangerous.

就说“我也该学学国王的行动力啊”……

虽然我这么说，但我自己也不清楚具体情况，<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>就是妻子她这心血来潮的性格，
有时候很让我伤脑筋。

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>My wife, Mei, has always been the sort to
act decisively. She never needed any help
in that area.
Yet she was further inspired by King
Sidon's succession.<unk[5:0]> She vowed to
"take the initiative just like our king."
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>She was racing all over from the moment
she awoke.<unk[5:0]> I feel it is likely she found her
"floating place" and "hopped" there.
I...do not truly understand what I am
saying either,<unk[5:0]> but one thing is for sure.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>My dear wife's impulsive actions can
sometimes cause a great deal of trouble
for our family.
*sigh*<unk[5:0]> Where could Mei be?<unk[5:0]> If only I had
tried to stop her before she crossed the
<Color=red>eastern<Color=white> bridge...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>林克先生……

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>迪美！<unk[5:1]>
迪美回来了！！
这都是多亏了林克先生！<unk[5:0]>
真的太谢谢了！！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>没想到她居然在空岛上……<unk[5:1]>
我担心得连水都喝不下了……！
……不过，林克先生，<unk[5:0]>
我看到迪美垂着头的样子，
就意识到，啊……<unk[5:0]>她肯定是一边自责
一边赶回我身边的……
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>所以，我就以用力摸头
简简单单原谅她了！
她能平安回来真是太好了……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>林克先生……

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>迪美他……！<unk[5:1]>
迪美他回來了！！
這都是多虧了林克先生！<unk[5:0]>
實在是太感謝你了！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>沒想到他居然是去了空島……<unk[5:1]>
我可是擔心到茶不思飯不想呢……！
……不過，林克先生，<unk[5:0]>
當我看到迪美垂頭喪氣的模樣之後……
我能看出，<unk[5:0]>他在回來這裡的路上
肯定不斷地在責備自己……
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>所以這次只有懲罰他
讓我用力地摸摸頭而已！
只要他能平安地回來，我就很高興了……

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>リンクさん…

<Ruby={4:8}しんぱい>心配で<Ruby={4:8}しんぱい>心配で <Ruby={2:4}みず>水さえ<Ruby={2:4}のど>喉を<Ruby={2:4}とお>通りませんでした…！

ああ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分で<Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分を<Ruby={2:4}しか>叱りながら

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:6}あたま>頭をゴシゴシなでる<Ruby={2:4}けい>刑だけで
<Ruby={2:4}ゆる>許してやりましたよ！
<Ruby={4:4}ぶじ>無事に<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰ってきてくれて <Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当によかった…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>Link...


<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>It's Mei!<unk[5:1]> My beloved Mei has finally
returned home!

It is all thanks to you, Link! <unk[5:0]>Thank you
so very much!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>It's hard to believe that she was on a sky
island...<unk[5:1]> I was so worried, I couldn't eat
a bite or even drink a drop of water!
Oh, Link...<unk[5:0]> When I saw Mei's sweet face,
her lovely head was hung in shame...

It was painfully clear<unk[5:0]> that she had already
scolded herself terribly over this on the
way back home.
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>I had no choice but to let her off the
hook and ease her concerns with a nice,
warm hug.
I'm just so happy that she's back home
safe and sound.

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我有點驚訝……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>雖然我在空島上滿腦子只想著生命鱸魚，<unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={4:6}きょう>今日からは <Ruby={2:6}むかし>昔みたいに ダーリンに<Ruby={4:8}むちゅう>夢中かな～！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>My darling...<unk[5:0]> I'm a little surprised that
you're showing so much emotion!
You never cease to amaze!
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>I was crazy about the hearty bass on the
sky island, <unk[5:0]>but from now on I'll only be
that crazy about YOU! Just like old times!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>By the way...<unk[5:1]> I tried to prepare something
for you. What do you think?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>ゾーラ<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族は <Ruby={2:4}なま>生で<Ruby={2:2}た>食べるのが<Ruby={2:2}す>好きだけど

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}われ>我ながら うまくいったよ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={6:10}しおかげん>塩加減～♪

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Us Zora eat fish raw, of course, <unk[5:0]>but I

as thanks!
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>I'm no expert, but the amount of salt I

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>迪美……<unk[5:0]>就算发生了这次这件事，

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>堅定希望

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>Mei...<unk[5:0]> Despite all that we have endured,

hope...
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>That you will never go anywhere
